title: Cycling Africa
overview: For the first time in history, the UCI Road World Championships are coming to African soil. This documentary captures the sweat, setbacks and symbolic power of cycling.

trailers.title: "J'aimerais devenir le prochain Biniam" : Cycling Africa, le doc sur le cyclisme en Afrique
